subcodes.first_line: O loving friends and handmaidens of the All-Merciful! You are in those remote and isolated islands, while we are in the Holy Land in [3.5s]... ...The power of the Covenant is as the heat of the sun which quickeneth and promoteth the development of all created things on earth
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان و اماء رحمن شما در آن جزائر دور و مهجور و ما در ارض مقدس در
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @unity; oneness of humanity
